title: Section 11
content: The following shall be the officers of the University and the Institute of Rural Management Anand School, namely:--- (a) the Vice-Chancellor; (b) the Director and ex officio Dean of the Institute of Rural Management Anand School; (c) the Dean; (d) the Registrar; (e) the Finance Officer; (f) the Controller of Examinations; (g) the Librarian; and (h) such other officers as may be provided by the Ordinances to be the officers of the University and the Institute of Rural Management Anand School.
